#!/bin/bash

set -euo pipefail

if [ -z "${1:-}" ]; then
    echo "Usage: $0 <directory>"
    exit 1
fi

DIR="$1"
COUNT=$(find "$DIR" -type f | wc -l)
echo "Found $COUNT files in $DIR"

for f in "$DIR"/*.log; do
    if [ -f "$f" ]; then
        echo "Processing $f"
        grep -c "ERROR" "$f" || true
    fi
done
